rationale: As a pro-tier creative editor and digital signage CMS, the UI must get out of the way of the bright, colorful advertising content. The 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype in a dark theme provides a precise, technical, and highly legible environment, heavily inspired by top-tier creative tools like Figma and Linear. We tint our grays with a cold blue for a 'technical/studio' feel.

typography.anti_default_rule: Inter is strictly forbidden for headings. Space Grotesk is forbidden for dashboards.

background.description: Deep obsidian blue-tinted black for the main application background. Not pure black.

surface.description: Panels (left/right sidebars) use #141720. The actual editable canvas background area uses a darker #07080A with a subtle dot grid to make the white ad slides pop.

layout.spacing_philosophy: Technical density for the editor, generous spacing for the dashboard.
layout.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid protocol: 'Control Room' grid layout. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.

editor_layout.top_bar: h-14 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-panel
editor_layout.left_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col bg-panel h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]
editor_layout.right_inspector: w-72 border-l border-white/10 flex flex-col bg-panel h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]
editor_layout.canvas_area: flex-1 bg-canvas_bg relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center cursor-crosshair

surfaces_and_micro_themes.panels: The 'Grid Borders' (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of 1px solid borders border-white/10 to separate panels. No massive drop shadows. Flat, precise.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.canvas: Should feature a repeating CSS radial-gradient or SVG pattern dot-grid to signify it's a workspace.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Neumorphic minimal: Flat background matching parent, 1px border border-white/10, text-primary. Hover states must explicitly lighten background and maintain border contrast.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.canvas_blocks: When a block (text, image, shape) is selected on the canvas, it MUST have a 2px solid #3B82F6 border and corner resize handles (small white squares with blue borders).

components.strategy: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts. Use heavily customized Shadcn for forms, modals, dropdowns, and tabs. Avoid Shadcn Cards for the editor layout; use semantic divs with explicit borders.

icons.rationale: Phosphor Icons offer the precise, technical 'duotone' or 'regular' weights needed for a pro-tier tool like this.

slide_designer.layers_panel: Left sidebar bottom half. Drag-and-drop list of layers. Use a compact list item with icon (Text/Image/Video) + Layer Name. Highlight active layer in blue.
slide_designer.thumbnails_panel: Left sidebar top half. Slide deck view. Numbered thumbnails of slides in the current playlist.
slide_designer.toolbar: Top center of the top bar. Toggle buttons for: Selection Arrow, Text, Image, Shape, Widget (Clock/Weather/Countdown).
slide_designer.properties_inspector: Right sidebar. Accordion or Sectioned layout. Sections: Position & Size (X, Y, W, H with text/number inputs), Appearance (Color, Opacity), Typography (if text block), and Data (if Widget).
slide_designer.canvas_block: Absolute positioned div within a relative slide container. Must support inline dragging and resizing. Z-index maps to the layers panel.

public_player.layout: 100vw 100vh, absolute edge-to-edge. OVERRIDE all dashboard styles. No scrollbars. No menus. Pure rendering of the active slide. Smooth crossfade or slide transitions between screens.

dashboard_bento.cards: Square or tall rectangles. Use pure borders. Top left: Active Screens (Stats). Top right: Recent Playlists (List). Bottom: Quick Actions.

interactions.hover_states: All buttons must explicitly define hover:text-white and hover:bg-white/5.
interactions.drag_and_drop: Use visual indicators (blue drop-lines) when reordering slides or layers.
interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-text-block-btn', data-testid='layer-item-3').

login_hero_background.description: Abstract ultra-minimalist dark geometric texture with subtle white grid lines. Use as the right-side split screen image on the Login/Register page.

sample_assets.description: White and red Nike athletic shoe. Use as a sample image block in the default/demo slide.
Modern coffee shop wall. Use as a sample background image block for a cafe advertising slide demo.
Cozy modern coffee shop interior. Use as an alternative demo background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Phase 1: Setup the layout shells. Build the Dashboard shell (top nav + bento grid) and the Editor shell (left panel, top bar, right panel, canvas center).
Phase 2: Implement the Slide Designer canvas. Ensure the main slide area is a fixed aspect ratio (e.g. 1920x1080) scaled down via CSS transform or aspect-ratio to fit the center canvas view.
Phase 3: Implement draggable blocks (Text, Image, Video, Shape). Use a library like react-rnd or framer-motion for drag/resize capabilities, mapping to X, Y, W, H properties.
Phase 4: Build the Left Sidebar. The top half should list 'Slides' in the playlist. The bottom half should map the 'Layers' (z-index) of the currently active slide. Tie the z-index to array ordering.
Phase 5: Build the Right Inspector. It must react to the currently selected block, updating state for dimensions, text content, and colors.
Phase 6: PPTX Import - implement a mock or basic parsing function if full parsing requires a heavy backend, but provide the UI to upload and 'convert' it into canvas blocks.
Phase 7: Public TV display. Create a separate route (e.g., /play/:screenId) that fetches the active playlist and cycles through slides in full screen using simple CSS transitions. Hide all UI here.
Phase 8: Ensure JWT auth protects the dashboard and editor routes.
CRITICAL: Adhere to the spacing and layout strategy. Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the editor UI. Use pure semantic HTML divs with explicit borders (border-white/10).
CRITICAL: Do not use Inter for headings. Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
CRITICAL: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
